button.name: %(download_all_devices_wizard_action)d
button.help: Download attendance from all configured biometric devices

button.name: test_connection_device
button.help: Test connection to the attendance device

button.name: download_attendance_async
button.help: Download Attendance from device (runs in background)

field.name: portnumber
field.help: Port which allows connection to the device

field.name: ommit_ping
field.help: Do not attempt to ping the IP before connecting to the device

field.name: protocol
field.help: UDP is good for older devices with smaller amounts of data, TCP should be used with devices that have larger amounts of data

field.name: api_type
field.help: Legacy API is used by older devices, New API is used by modern devices which usually support face recognition as well. Using wrong API will result in invalid attendance status.

field.name: time_zone
field.help: Select the timezone for your location or the desired time zone for the system.

field.name: password
field.help: Specify password if the biometric device is password protected

field.name: action
field.help: Actions Performed on the machine whether sign-in or sign-out or both

field.name: fetch_days
field.help: If -1 means all attendances will be fetched otherwise will get the attendance from last number of days specified

field.name: force_action
field.help: Only used when 'Dedicated Devices' routing mode is selected in Attendance Settings. Forces ALL punches from this device to be treated as Sign-In or Sign-Out, regardless of the device's own punch type.
